record.field: Restricted internal access to Bitrix tasks explicitly assigned to the employee.
Bitrix task employee: guard task visibility

[(1, '=', 1)] if (not user.has_group('bitrix_migration.group_bitrix_task_employee') or user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else [('user_ids', 'in', user.id)]
Bitrix task employee: guard project visibility

[(1, '=', 1)] if (not user.has_group('bitrix_migration.group_bitrix_task_employee') or user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else [('task_ids.user_ids', 'in', user.id)]
